title: Build /smoke-test skill with real pipeline execution
description: Create a /smoke-test skill that runs a real directive through the pipeline end-to-end, validates each step, and reports pass/fail.

in: SKILL.md for /smoke-test with YAML frontmatter and step-by-step instructions
Bash runner script that creates test directive, spawns /directive session, polls directive.json, validates artifacts, reports results, cleans up
test_mode support in 11-completion-gate.md for auto-approve during tests
Migrate pipeline-smoke-test and pipeline-smoke-test-heavyweight scenarios from lessons/scenarios.md to smoke-test skill directory
out: Custom test framework or assertion library
Heavyweight test path with pre-canned CEO responses (future work)

dod.criterion: Running /smoke-test produces a step-by-step report with pass/fail per pipeline step and evidence
Test creates a real directive, runs it through the pipeline, and the builder actually modifies a file
Completion gate auto-approves when test_mode: true is set in directive.json
Test branch and directive artifacts are cleaned up after the test (pass or fail)
Pipeline-mechanical scenarios moved from lessons/scenarios.md to smoke-test skill directory

tasks.title: Create SKILL.md and bash runner for /smoke-test
tasks.description: Create .claude/skills/smoke-test/SKILL.md with YAML frontmatter (name: smoke-test, description) and instructions that invoke the bash runner. Create .claude/skills/smoke-test/run-smoke-test.sh that: creates a test directive (medium weight, trivial task like 'add a comment to a file'), spawns a real /directive session via spawn-agent.ts, polls directive.json every 10s for step progression, runs validate-gate.sh per completed step, enforces 5-minute overall timeout, prints a pass/fail table per pipeline step with evidence, cleans up test branch and directive artifacts via trap on EXIT.

dod.criterion: SKILL.md exists at .claude/skills/smoke-test/SKILL.md with valid YAML frontmatter and instructions
run-smoke-test.sh creates a test directive directory with directive.json and directive.md
run-smoke-test.sh spawns a real /directive session and polls directive.json for step progression
run-smoke-test.sh validates each completed step via validate-gate.sh
run-smoke-test.sh prints a pass/fail table per pipeline step
run-smoke-test.sh cleans up test branch and directive artifacts via trap on EXIT

tasks.title: Add test_mode auto-approve to completion gate
tasks.description: Add test_mode: true check to 11-completion-gate.md so the completion STOP gate auto-approves during smoke tests instead of waiting for CEO interaction. Add test_mode field to directive-json.md schema. Document test_mode in 00-delegation-and-triage.md.

dod.criterion: 11-completion-gate.md checks for test_mode: true in directive.json and auto-approves if set
directive-json.md schema documents the test_mode field
00-delegation-and-triage.md mentions test_mode for smoke testing context

tasks.title: Migrate scenarios and dry-run integration test
tasks.description: Move pipeline-smoke-test and pipeline-smoke-test-heavyweight scenario definitions from .context/lessons/scenarios.md to .claude/skills/smoke-test/scenarios.md. Do not rewrite or expand them — just move. Then dry-run the bash runner to verify it starts, creates a test directive, and reports (it may not complete the full pipeline in dry-run but should exercise the setup and polling logic).

dod.criterion: pipeline-smoke-test and pipeline-smoke-test-heavyweight scenarios exist in .claude/skills/smoke-test/scenarios.md
The two scenarios are removed from .context/lessons/scenarios.md
Dry-run of run-smoke-test.sh starts successfully, creates test directive artifacts, and begins polling
